description: Multi-provider LLM architecture — refactored LlmClient with provider abstraction
summary: Extracted LLM types to shared module. Created 4 providers: MockProvider (always available fallback with setup instructions), AnthropicProvider (direct API with updated model IDs), CopilotProvider (VS Code LM API for Copilot/Claude Code/Codex subscriptions), ModelRouterProvider (routes through model-router service). Refactored LlmClient to use provider abstraction with auto-detection. Updated model IDs to claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.

description: Real MCP client implementation replacing stub
summary: Replaced 49-line McpClient stub with full SSE transport implementation. Connects to MCP gateway on port 3100. Supports JSON-RPC tool calls, tool discovery, exponential backoff reconnection, and graceful degradation when gateway is unreachable. Wired connect/dispose lifecycle into extension activation.

description: Added provider configuration settings to extension manifest
summary: Added sota.provider (auto/copilot/anthropic/model-router/mock), sota.modelRouterUrl, and sota.mcpGatewayUrl configuration settings.

description: Fixed duplicate variable declaration in MCP gateway memoryQuery tool
summary: Removed duplicate createQuery block that caused a build error in memoryQuery.ts.

description: Son of Anton v2 visual identity — color tokens, theme, fonts, icons
summary: 32 CSS custom properties, 22 registered VS Code colors, 200+ theme overrides eliminating VS Code blue, Geist variable fonts, 7 custom SVG activity bar icons.

description: Mission Control — agile kanban board with full ticket management
summary: 5-column kanban (Queued/Running/Review/Complete/Failed), 5 ticket types (Epic/Story/Subtask/Bug/Spike), full CRUD with counter-based IDs, persistence to .son-of-anton/board.json, filter bar, ARIA roles, task cards with metrics and acceptance criteria.

description: DAG Explorer — dependency and task graph with BFS impact analysis
summary: Three-layer DAG (Dependency/Task/Impact), SVG-based graph rendering, BFS impact analysis, node detail panel, layer selector toolbar.

description: Terminal Blocks, Title Bar, Mode Toggle, Welcome Screen, Spec Renderer
summary: Terminal blocks with OSC metadata parsing and agent attribution. Title bar with model indicator, context bar, cost ticker, agent badge. Mode toggle via Cmd+Shift+M. Welcome screen with branded wordmark. Spec renderer with EARS clause cards and task checklists.

description: Infrastructure foundations — Memory, Checkpoints, ACP types and services
summary: Hybrid memory with in-memory keyword search (SQLite/Docker backends TODO). In-memory checkpoint service (git plumbing TODO). ACP service with JSON-RPC 2.0 types and agent registry.

description: View container registrations — all surfaces visible in activity bar
summary: Registered view containers with Codicon icons (project, graphLine, database, notebook) in sessions sidebar. Created MemoryBrowserView pane with search input and results list.

description: Integration wiring — event-driven connections between all subsystems
summary: IntegrationWiringContribution connects Mission Control to Checkpoints (auto-checkpoint on Running), Memory (index completed tickets), DAG Explorer (update node status), and Title Bar (active agent count).
